text:
(In reply to Andrey V. Elsukov from comment #3)

I think you are right.

Here's a full paste of Racoon debug logs from a connect and disconnect event:

https://paste.ubuntu.com/25468145/

Interesting lines are 1078-1124 (connnect), and 1188-1198 (disconnect).

Here's a setkey -x paste of another connect and disconnect:

https://paste.ubuntu.com/25468126/

Hope this helps!
